metadata.title: CodaCrew: Technical Partner for Startups, MVPs & SaaS
metadata.description: We help founders turn ideas into scalable digital products. Senior engineers building MVPs, SaaS and AI-powered products from day one.

hero.subheadline: We help founders design, build and scale digital products with senior engineers and modern technology, from the first line of code to production.

meta.description: Professional page ready in a few days for psychologists, dentists, nutritionists and physical therapists. Build more credibility and professionalism.
meta.ogTitle: Page for Healthcare Professionals - Ready in Days

hero.headline: Are you a healthcare professional without a professional website?
hero.headlineHighlight: Get a complete and modern online presence, ready in just a few days.
hero.subheadline: CodaCrew creates professional websites for nutritionists, psychologists, and other healthcare professionals who want more credibility and new patients, without hassle and high costs.
hero.bullet1: Professional page for a price that fits your pocket
hero.bullet2: Ready in a few days, no hassle
hero.bullet3: Ideal for psychologists, dentists, nutritionists and physical therapists
hero.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm a healthcare professional and want to know more about having my professional page.
hero.imageCaption: For professionals who want to grow online

mission.headline: Who's behind CodaCrew
mission.subheadline: We're Felício and Gabriel Santos. We created CodaCrew to help professionals stand out online, especially those just starting out.

member1.bio: Over 12 years creating pages and systems on the internet. My mission is to make the internet accessible to those who really need it.

member2.bio: Specialist in creating pages for professionals. I believe every professional deserves quality online presence.

mission.missionTitle: Help new professionals have a professional presence on the internet
mission.missionDescription: We know that at the beginning of a career, budgets are tight. That's why we create professional pages with affordable prices, without compromising on quality.

problem.headline: Instagram alone doesn't build trust
problem.subheadline: When someone looks for a healthcare professional, trust is everything. But many professionals still rely only on social media.

problem1.title: Instagram Dependency
problem1.description: You're limited to what Instagram allows and could lose all your followers if something goes wrong.

problem2.title: Doesn't convey credibility
problem2.description: Potential patients may doubt your seriousness when you don't have a professional page.

problem3.title: Loses patients
problem3.description: Many professionals lose opportunities by appearing too amateur or informal.

problem.emphasis: A professional page shows you take your career seriously and gives patients the confidence they need.

solution.headline: A professional page changes how you're perceived
solution.subheadline: Have a serious presence on the internet that conveys professionalism and inspires confidence.

benefit1.title: More Credibility
benefit1.description: Patients trust professionals with a professional and well-structured presence on the internet more.

benefit2.title: More Professionalism
benefit2.description: A well-made page shows you care about your image and career.

benefit3.title: Serious Presence on the Internet
benefit3.description: Be found on Google and have your own space, independent of social media.

benefit4.title: Your Own Space
benefit4.description: A place where patients can learn about you, your services and contact you easily.

solution.emphasis: You don't need to understand the internet.
solution.emphasisSub: We take care of everything for you.

included.headline: What's included in your page
included.subheadline: Everything you need to start serving with professionalism. Simple and complete.

0.description: Modern and professional design, made especially for healthcare professionals.

1.title: Professional Design
1.description: Visual that conveys trust and credibility to your patients.

2.title: Works on Phone and Computer
2.description: Your patients can access it perfectly from any device.

3.title: About You
3.description: Page to tell your story, education and experience.

4.title: Your Services
4.description: Clearly show what you offer and how you can help.

included.ctaTitle: Everything ready for you to start
included.ctaSubtitle: No need to worry about anything technical. We take care of everything.

audience.headline: Who is it for
audience.closing: If you see patients, this page is for you.
audience.closingSub: It doesn't matter if you're just starting or have been practicing for years.

team.subheadline: We're a small, experienced team. We've worked on major projects and now help professionals position themselves better online.

member1.name: Felício Santos
member1.bio: Over 12 years of experience creating pages and systems. I've worked on projects for Hugo Boss, Calvin Klein and Globo.

member2.name: Gabriel Santos
member2.bio: Specialist in creating pages that work. Experience in large-scale projects.

team.closing: Our goal isn't to flaunt experience, but to use it to create something simple, functional and professional for you.

list.author: Ana Costa

about.title: Meet Your Psychologist
about.description: I am a clinical psychologist with over 12 years of experience in patient care. Specialized in Cognitive-Behavioral Therapy, my mission is to help people overcome their emotional challenges and achieve a more balanced and fulfilling life.

faq.title: Clear Your Doubts
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the therapeutic process

list.question: How does the first appointment work?
list.answer: The first appointment is an initial assessment where we'll discuss your goals, history, and expectations. It's a moment for us to get to know each other and for you to decide if you want to start the therapeutic process.

list.question: How long are the sessions?
list.answer: Each session lasts 50 minutes. I recommend weekly or biweekly sessions, depending on each case.

list.question: Do you offer online sessions?
list.answer: Yes! I offer both in-person and online sessions with the same quality and effectiveness. Online sessions are conducted via video call on a secure platform.

list.question: How much does an appointment cost?
list.answer: Contact me for information about prices and payment methods. I work with affordable rates and offer installment options.

list.question: Do you accept insurance?
list.answer: I work privately, but I provide receipts for reimbursement with your insurance, when applicable.

list.question: How do I schedule an appointment?
list.answer: You can schedule via WhatsApp, phone, or through the contact form. I respond within 24 hours.

list.question: How long does treatment last?
list.answer: Duration varies according to each case. Some people achieve their goals in a few months, others prefer to maintain longer-term support.

list.question: What is Cognitive-Behavioral Therapy?
list.answer: It's a therapeutic approach focused on identifying and modifying thought and behavior patterns that cause suffering, promoting practical and lasting changes.
